debug_info.goal:
S : Type
rule : RelInt S
n : ℕ
f : Fin n → List (RelInt S)
i : Fin n
j : Fin (f i).length
Hij : rule = (f i).get j
⊢ (∃ a, a ∈ Graphiti.Projects.Noc.fin_range n ∧ f a = f i) ∧ (f i)[↑j] ∈ f i

failed_attempts:
use i
        <;> simp_all [fin_in_fin_range]
        <;>
        (try decide) <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
          <;> omega
        })
      })
    have h₄ : (f i).get j ∈ (fin_range n).map f |>.flatten := by
      have h₅ : (f i).get j ∈ f i := h₂
      have h₆ : f i ∈ (fin_range n).map f := h₃
      have h₇ : (f i).get j ∈ (fin_range n).map f |>.flatten := by
        apply List.mem_flatten.mpr
        exact ⟨f i, h₆, h₅⟩
      exact h₇
    exact h₄
  simp_all [List.mem_map, List.mem_flatten]
  <;>
  (try {
    aesop
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
    <;> omega
  })

exact ⟨Finset.mem_univ (f i), by
          have h₁ : (f i)[↑j] ∈ f i := by simpa using List.get_mem (f i) ↑j
          simp_all [Finset.mem_coe]
          <;> aesop⟩

have h₂ : (j : ℕ) < (f i).length := by
          simpa using j.is_lt
        have h₃ : (f i).length ≠ 0 := by
          by_contra h₄
          have h₅ : (f i).length = 0 := by simpa using h₄
          have h₆ : (j : ℕ) < 0 := by
            omega
          omega
        omega
      omega
    })

<;>
          (try
            {
              simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ, fin_range]
              <;> omega
            })
        exact h₂
      -- Since f i is in the map, we can use it directly to find the element.
      have h₂ : (f i).get ↑j ∈ f i := by
        -- Prove that the element is in the list f i
        have h₃ : (f i).get ↑j ∈ f i := by
          apply List.get_mem
          <;>
          (try decide) <;>
          (try omega)
        exact h₃
      -- Combine the results to show that the element is in the flattened list.
      have h₃ : (∃ (a : Fin n), a ∈ fin_range n ∧ f a = f i) ∧ (f i)[↑j] ∈ f i := by
        constructor
        · -- Prove that there exists an a in fin_range n such that f a = f i
          refine' ⟨i, _⟩
          <;> simp_all [h₁]
          <;>
          (try decide) <;>
          (try omega)
        · -- Prove that the element is in f i
          simpa [List.get_eq_getElem] using h₂
      -- Use the results to show that the element is in the flattened list.
      tauto

<;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try {
      use j
      <;> simp_all [List.get]
      <;>
      (try decide) <;>
      (try omega)
    }) <;>
    (try {
      use i
      <;> simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_mk, Nat.lt_succ_iff]
      <;>
      (try decide) <;>
      (try omega)
    })
    <;>
    (try aesop)

simp_all [Fin.is_lt]
      <;>

      <;>
      (try omega)
    })
  <;>
